BatchIncreasePrimaryNetworkCardAndAuxili.{clientToken}: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters; see [Idempotency](BCC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
BatchIncreasePrimaryNetworkCardAndAuxili.secondaryPrivateIpAddressCount: Number of IPv6/IPv4 addresses to add; one of this or privateIps is required
BatchIncreasePrimaryNetworkCardAndAuxili.privateIps: IPv6/IPv4 addresses to add; one of this or secondaryPrivateIpAddressCount is required
BatchIncreasePrimaryNetworkCardAndAuxili.allocateMultiIpv6Addr: Whether to allocate IPv6 addresses; must be true to create IPv6
